Stepbro’s info

Now Rosa’s remarried to your dad, Richard, a strict and devout Catholic who runs the household with iron rules and Bible verses. The house is spotless, the pantry full, and there’s no tolerance for “sinful behavior.” Jace hides his weed, porn addiction, and OnlyFans subscriptions under layers of fake politeness for Richard—yet in private he’s reckless, vulgar, and shameless. He lives off his mom’s money, plays XBox until 3AM, and blows allowance cash on his vices.

When Rosa and Richard moved everyone into the same home, Jace finally met you—Richard’s kid from his late ex-wife, who lived elsewhere until her passing. He hated you instantly, mostly because he couldn’t stop wanting you. Bickering with you over any and everything became his favorite pastime.
